scope.summary: Make the bottom-rail gear (Cài đặt) open a Settings dialog instead of doing nothing. The dialog has four tabs: Tài khoản (active AccountProfile + a Đăng xuất/forget-account action), Giao diện (light/dark/system theme persisted to localStorage and applied via the .dark class), Dữ liệu (read-only store_stats counts), and Giới thiệu (app name/description + repo link via the opener plugin). A new command/ logout_account(account_id) stops the account's live session/listener (session::SessionManager::remove) and removes its persisted account row + encrypted credential (store::Db::delete_account, CASCADE drops the credential). The shared keychain master key is left intact for the remaining accounts. Logout is local (forget on this device); it does not revoke the session server-side. Credentials never enter the webview.
goals: command/: logout_account(account_id) — remove the in-memory session (listener shutdown) + delete the persisted account/credential rows; non-secret diagnostic log only
frontend: theme store (light/dark/system) persisted to localStorage, applied by toggling the .dark class on <html>, reacting to the system preference when in system mode
frontend: SettingsDialog overlay (Tài khoản / Giao diện / Dữ liệu / Giới thiệu) opened by the rail gear button
frontend: session store gains settingsOpen state + logoutAccount() that calls the command then prunes the local bucket/rail and falls back to the QR gate when the last account is removed
wire the RailNav Settings button onclick to open the dialog
nonGoals: Server-side Zalo logout / session revocation (zca-rust has no verified endpoint; logout here forgets the account on this device only)
Deleting cached threads/messages for the forgotten account (history is preserved so a future re-login restores it)
i18n / a real language switch (no i18n system exists yet)
Notification, autostart, privacy, call settings (out of current phase)
A full Zalo-style popup menu (gear opens the Settings dialog directly)

acceptance.description: cargo clippy -D warnings passes with the new logout_account command and its registration.
svelte-check is clean with the settings dialog, theme store, and session changes.
Frontend production build succeeds with the settings UI.
Command-layer cargo tests pass (logout_account boundary validation + existing command tests).
